predicates.name: last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the company's last closed financial year.

predicates.name: first_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the company's first financial year.

predicates.name: good_faith_estimate_at_beginning_of_year
predicates.description: The company made the relevant figures estimate in good faith at the beginning of the financial year.

predicates.name: employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the statutory employee criterion in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the statutory net turnover criterion in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the statutory balance sheet total criterion in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the statutory criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: no_more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company does not exceed more than one of the statutory criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: estimated_employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company's good faith estimate exceeds the statutory employee criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: estimated_turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company's good faith estimate exceeds the statutory net turnover criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: estimated_balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company's good faith estimate exceeds the statutory balance sheet total criterion for the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_estimated_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company's good faith estimate shows that more than one statutory criterion will be exceeded in the financial year.

predicates.name: no_more_than_one_estimated_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company's good faith estimate does not show that more than one statutory criterion will be exceeded in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company is legally classified as a small company for the financial year.

predicates.name: estimate_must_be_taken_into_account_immediately
predicates.description: The company must immediately take the good faith estimate into account for the first financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The company's annual average number of employees in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The company's annual net turnover excluding value added tax in the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The company's balance sheet total in the financial year.

functions.name: estimated_annual_average_employees
functions.description: The good faith estimated annual average number of employees for the financial year.

functions.name: estimated_annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The good faith estimated annual net turnover excluding value added tax for the financial year.

functions.name: estimated_balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The good faith estimated balance sheet total for the financial year.
